name: GenM
description: Developer of an educational platform designed to offer online marketing courses. The company's platform features free online marketing courses like email, social media, and SEO marketing created by industry experts, enabling students to acquire in-demand skills and also helping to find and apply for an apprenticeship.

name: ActualConversion
description: Developer of data insights software designed to make better business decisions. The company's platform collects data generated by various marketing platforms used by a business, then filters and normalizes that data into a universal language with relevant business insights and recommendations, enabling businesses to streamline their marketing campaigns.

name: AmpMe
description: Developer of a music application designed to synchronize multiple audio devices together to play the music louder. The company's application offers syncing and Bluetooth functions that facilitate a seamless connection between portable speakers and smartphones, enabling customers to synchronize their phones and create a portable sound system.

name: Anduin Transactions
description: Developer of modular and interoperable tools designed to revolutionize the investor onboarding experience in the alternative and private markets. The company's platform engages limited partners with marketing-focused data rooms and provides a secure and collaborative environment to navigate the complex subscription process, enabling clients to connect with limited partners and general partners efficiently.

name: ApplyBoard
description: Provider of online education services intended to empower students around the world to access education. The company's platform automates and streamlines the educational application process by connecting students and recruitment agencies with post-secondary institutions, enabling students from all around the world to apply to universities in North America without any hassles.

name: Avidbots
description: Developer of autonomous robotics systems designed to automate commercial floor cleaning. The company's systems cooperate to clean department stores, auto dealerships, education facilities, airports, and other commercial cleaning spaces and thus automates the most labor and time-intensive part of commercial cleaning, enabling the cleaning crew to focus on higher-value cleaning tasks and leaving repetitive and tedious floor scrubbing to robots.

name: Beatdapp
description: Operator of a SaaS-based platform intended to help music labels and artists track their songs to collect royalties. The company's tracking system authenticates, verifies, and validates media streamed in real-time and reduces the tracking discrepancies between Digital Service Providers (DSPs) and rights holders, enabling DSPs to increase their royalty revenue for rights holders while limiting legal exposure to royalty lawsuits.

name: Blackcart
description: Developer of an e-commerce artificial intelligence (AI) platform designed to transform an online store into an at-home showroom. The company's platform offers customers to try on items from their favorite brands at home using AI tools without an upfront commitment, enabling businesses to increase sales by offering a try before you buy experience to their customers.

name: Blume
description: Provider of a female hygiene subscription box service intended to deliver safe and sustainable period products. The company offers a customized selection of pads and tampons, acne-fighting products, hygiene, and self-care items, enabling young females to get personal care products easily at their doorstep without needing to run to the drug store.

name: Breather
description: Developer of an online real estate platform intended to provide office and workspaces on rent. The company's platform provides office spaces by the hour, day or week which are fully equipped for meetings that help users to host video conferences and stay connected, enabling businesses and corporate clients to get spaces as per their requirements that help them improve their operations.

name: Z1
description: Developer of a mobile game application designed to play favorite games over video chat. The company's application delivers a social gaming experience on smartphones and tablets even when the players are physically apart, enabling video gamers to play with friends with the liberty to laugh together and engage in friendly banter.

name: Chatsimple
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence chatbot platform designed to provide sales support for businesses. The company's platform offers lead generation, qualification and conversion, artificial intelligence customer support and sales with access to different language barriers, enabling businesses to do their marketing and social broadcasting properly.

name: CloutJam
description: Global infrastructure for the next generation of content-driven, creator-led marketing.

name: Element Ai
description: Developer of AI software designed to offer deep domain expertise and access to cutting-edge technology. The company's software operationalize and create business impact with a suite of products, services and tools which redefine peak performance with problem-solving technology that continuously learns and improves, enabling clients to unlock insights, accelerate adoption and allow their employees to make decisions with explainable solutions.

name: Hykso
description: Developer of a wearable motion tracker designed to monitor and view a fighter's punch output in real-time. The company's tracker tracks a hand's movement several times per second to detect the number, type, and velocity of all the punches, and its application permits measuring daily, weekly, and monthly progression, enabling fighters to compare their speed, punch count, and intensity compared to other fighters to better know their strengths and weaknesses.

name: Flexpa
description: Developer of a healthcare platform designed to ensure better outcomes through the use of diagnostic tests and lab reports. The company's product digitizes collected data from disparate hardware providers, interprets it, and then creates analytics dashboards to see how both individual patients and groups of patients are doing, enabling healthcare providers to determine treatment plans and pharmaceutical options for patients.

name: FlightFox
description: Operator of cloud-based travel management platform intended to offer online travel planning services. The company's cloud-based travel management platform allows to search, book, analyze and report on flights, hotels, cars and handles all changes and cancellations, enabling users to minimize travel complexities.

name: Fluent.ai
description: Developer of a personalized voice user interface technology designed to improve reliability and accuracy in speech recognition. The company's voice interface technology sidesteps the need to convert speech to text and instead learns to understand the meaning of audible speech in any language or accent as well as performs robustly even in offline and noisy environments, enabling consumer electronic device manufacturers and OEMs to develop convenient and secure voice user interface solutions for their devices.

name: FullContact
description: Developer of an identity resolution management platform intended to provide personalized connections between people and brands. The company's platform provides a smart cloud-based address book for users that transforms partial identities into complete profiles in order to connect with prospects and capture audience insights, enabling clients to resolve and enrich contact records for enhanced customer experience and authentic customer engagement.

name: humi.ca
description: Developer of cloud-based software designed to automate human resources processes. The company's software facilitates employee recruiting and onboarding, time-off tracking, scheduling, payroll management, benefits administration, as well as performance monitoring and reporting, enabling businesses to simplify and modernize human resource management.

name: Influitive
description: Provider of an advocacy and engagement marketing platform designed to help companies discover, nurture, and mobilize their advocates to accelerate sales and increase customer lifetime value. The company's platform captures customer enthusiasm and uses it to turbocharge marketing and sales efforts for more rapid and profitable revenue growth, enabling advocates to convert prospects into customers and new customers into successful customers.

name: INGU
description: Manufacturer of pipers technology system intended for efficient and economical pipeline inspection solutions. The company combines inline leak detection, deposit surveys, and wall condition monitoring technology to provide full insight into all pipeline assets under all conditions, helping clients to make well-informed decisions to keep their pipelines safe and efficient.

name: InnerSpace
description: Developer of an indoor mapping and location intelligence platform designed to improve the usage of indoor space. The company's platform gives insight into how people use their space which drives revenue and improves operations in their smart buildings, enabling businesses to access data to action and utilize indoor spaces more efficiently.

name: Keatext
description: Developer of an AI-powered text analytics platform designed to synthesize feedback from multiple channels to produce insights delivered on one comprehensive dashboard. The company's platform uses deep learning applied to natural language processing to unlock the meaning behind volumes of text customer feedback by identifying topics that show up and interpret the sentiment and intent behind the comments, enabling clients to dive into the data and find key insights.

name: Linkett
description: Developer of a digital signage analytics platform designed to offer live audience data for digital out-of-home advertising. The company's platform provides real-time, actionable insights by generating a series of performance reports for website impressions and dwell times as well as offers engagement and conversion metrics, enabling enterprises to increase their advertisement revenues as well as access real-time campaign analytics to measure and improve performance.

name: Local Logic
description: Developer of a real estate platform intended to offer insights and analysis for residential real estate. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence, geospatial and user-generated data to quantify lifestyle and location qualities for any address in the US and Canada, enabling real estate developers to understand the demand of citizens and begin conversations with a transparent and organized understanding of what a city and community need.

name: Logojoy
description: Developer of a logo design and brand identity platform designed to create professional-quality logos. The company's platform uses proprietary machine and deep learning models in various aspects of the design, enabling business owners to create logos in a convenient and affordable way.

name: Malaeb
description: Developer of a mobile application platform designed to search and book football fields around Bahrain. The company's application helps to edit the bookings and keep the booking process in real-time, create teams, challenge other users and join a football match and permits each user to have a profile with activities and reviews, enabling football players to book pitches close to location conveniently and time-efficiently.

name: Mejuri
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to sell handcrafted fine jewelry for everyday use. The company's direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform features products such as rings, pendants, earrings, bracelets, and other luxury jewelry made up of precious and semi-precious stones, enabling women to buy handcrafted accessories online.

name: Mero
description: Developer of a cloud-based platform designed to give predictive insights to cleaners and property managers. The company's platform uses smart sensor technology to provide a real-time view of a building's usage trends and inventory supply levels, property managers to dispatch cleaning teams to high-priority areas on an intelligent just-in-time basis, enabling clients to optimize the way buildings perform day-to-day cleaning maintenance.

name: Meya.ai
description: Developer of a customer experience automation platform designed to automate conversational artificial intelligence and workflow. The company's platform permits the building, training, and hosting of digital assistants and bots using bot flow abstraction and features conversational framework, analytics, and tools for integration with messenger applications, enabling businesses and brands to reduce operational costs and expand customer experience capabilities.

name: Moj.io
description: Developer of a modular SaaS platform designed to build, launch, and scale connected mobility services. The company's platform, applications, and services deliver a smarter, safer, and more convenient car ownership experience for the global driving community and offer GPS fleet tracking solutions for small businesses that rely on their vehicles to get the job done, providing individuals and businesses with scalable, secure and hardware-agnostic connected mobility services.

name: Motion
description: Developer of a creative analytics platform designed to increase the impact of creative performance through data-driven decision-making. The company's platform offers different tools that translate insights into visual reports to bridge the gap between media buyers and creatives and combines visual content with performance metrics, enabling growth and marketing teams of businesses to eliminate information overload and identify key drivers of creative performance to improve their creative strategy.

name: Optimity
description: Developer of a corporate wellness platform designed to keep employees healthy and happy. The company's platform uses mobile apps and wearables to coach employees to build healthy habits with micro-actions during their daily routines, enabling employers to keep employees healthy, reduce attrition and improve productivity.

name: Orchard Labs
description: Developer of an online phone-based retail platform intended to make devices accessible to people. The company's platform connects buyers and sellers of used phones and helps bring down the cost of ownership by providing an inclusive return to someone selling their device, helping customers get an affordable option, and transact in a safe and hassle-free manner.

name: Penfield.AI
description: Developer of a cybersecurity platform designed to enhance security operations through process automation and performance optimization. The company's platform equips security teams with AI-powered tools for process standardization, bottleneck analysis and personalized automation, enabling clients to streamline workflows, optimize performance and elevate overall security posture.

name: Remitbee
description: Developer of a financial platform designed for cross-currency money transfer transactions. The company's money transfer platform offers a user-friendly service in which customers can send money online using their web browsers, tablets and mobile phones, enabling users to easily send money straight from their bank accounts and cash accounts worldwide.

name: Renotag, Inc.
description: Renotag is a renovation cost calculator gives you accurate market pricing for your project — like having a contractor in your pocket.

name: Rhythmos
description: Developer of an algorithmic system intended to optimize the entire electric mobility ecosystem. The company's algorithmic optimization system (AOS) platform uses advanced machine learning and data analytics to optimize grid performance, considering fleet owner operational requirements, existing utility tariffs and rates, electric utility infrastructure capacity and grid constraints, wholesale energy market pricing, and more, enabling clients the transition to a decarbonized power grid based on distributed energy resources as primary service providers.

name: Rover
description: Provider of mobile campaign platform designed to drive mobile engagement and monetization with enhanced mobile campaigns. The company's mobile campaign platform offers to design rich, native experiences in the browser and create a sponsored activation of any event, a mobile campaign experience or even an interactive trivia game, enabling clients to deliver the mobile content to the right audience and the right time.

name: Sampler
description: Provider of self-serve digital product sampling services intended to make it targeted, measurable, and turnkey. The company's services include capturing demographic and behavioral insights on every product sample with easy-to-read results, enabling businesses to understand the consumer analytics and preferences behind the product.

name: Set Scouter
description: Operator of a scouting marketplace intended to connect filmmakers with property owners. The company's platform connects filmmakers looking for sets with landlords looking to rent out their space for production, enabling clients to easily find film-ready spaces catering to production needs.

name: Shoelace
description: Provider of an artificial intelligence-powered virtual assistant tool intended to help brands implement customer journey marketing. The company's tool helps e-commerce merchants launch retargeting campaigns on social media as well as takes visitors through a brand experience after they leave the store and keeps them engaged with a sequence of ad experiences, enabling brands to recapture visitors who abandon their website and increase sales.

name: Swept
description: Developer of an operational cleaning management platform designed to oversee commercial cleaning businesses. The company's platform assists cleaning companies in communicating with employees and customers, completing inspections, and ordering supplies in real-time, enabling companies to increase profits and customer retention.

name: Swift Charge
description: Developer of an EV charging technology designed to tackle the electrical grid infrastructure problems. The company's technology helps to build a future with a clean and low-cost energy system that seamlessly integrates renewable energy sources, energy storage, and zero-emission vehicles, enabling clients to deploy EV charging stations with minimized cost and effort.

name: Synervoz
description: Developer of an innovation & software studio intended to focus on audio, entertainment, and online collaboration. The company has designed, developed, and co-created apps, SDKs, and embedded products with complex audio pipelines focused on custom engineering solutions for other companies and source code that can be licensed or purchased outright, enabling clients to have access to applications that are balanced in real-time and offers non-live content that can be synchronized between parties.

name: Unito
description: Developer of a project management platform designed to integrate disparate SaaS applications and to synchronize projects, tasks, and conversations between different applications. The company's platform helps to work seamlessly without switching applications all the time, choose what to sync between tools, and copy a few tasks or entire projects from multiple tools, enabling businesses to be productive and have enhanced team collaboration.

name: UrbanLogiq
description: Developer of urban data analytics platform designed to equip public officials with the tools to build safe, strong, and resilient communities. The company's platform permits tracking and visualization of business data, gathering of actionable intelligence and early warning indicators, as well as tracking of transportation and traffic data, enabling governments to generate fast insights in one platform without any data wrangling or specialized training.

name: Chatter Research
description: Developer of an online market research platform designed to engage customers in conversational surveys over text message. The company's platform offers online customer feedback about a brand, product or company by using artificial intelligence and chatbots, as well as helps users to have a text message conversation with customers right after they have interacted with their brand and get immediate feedback, enabling businesses and brands to engage their customers in a conversational survey and get real time data to run their business.

name: Clarity
description: Provider of website that connects people with financial advisors. The company connects advisers with advice seekers for one on one calls.

name: Cadee
description: Operator of a social community for golfers. The company has developed an online platform through which golfers can discover new courses, share and compare golf scores, track golf activities of other members and calculate golf statistics.

name: Neutun
description: Developer of a novel tracking software designed to track epileptic events. The company's novel tracking software offers a pre existing wearable offers continuous passive tracking, medication reminders, notification and recording progress services, enabling epilepsy patients with a seizure tracking tool to track chronic and acute health conditions.

name: Unbounce
description: Provider of an online platform designed to increase website and campaign conversions. The company's platform provides tools to build custom landing pages, which increase website and campaign conversions and helps marketers to quickly create, launch and test high-converting landing pages, popups, and sticky bars without developers, enabling them to create better marketing experiences.

name: Cyberpsyc
description: Provider of on-demand online therapy for mental health issues designed to keep mental health in check. The company's on-demand online therapy for mental health is a self-help interactive therapy and specializes in providing computerized cognitive behavioral therapy (CCBT) for the treatment of stress, anxiety and depression, enabling students to get help for their mental well-being.

name: Homigo
description: Provider of home services platform intended to help users take care of all their home maintenance and repairs. The company's platform offers concierge service for managing home maintenance such as plumbing, landscaping, pools, exterior, broken appliances, handyman, HVAC, masonry, roofing and electrical wiring repair, enabling users to avail a one point of contact for home maintenance & repair needs.

name: Famebit
description: Operator of a marketplace for businesses to find, hire and work with YouTube influencers for product and service endorsements. The company streamlines the whole process from connection to video delivery by providing self-serve tools that allow businesses to deploy YouTube marketing campaigns for product endorsement such as product reviews, tutorials and hauls.

name: Lagoa
description: Operator of a three dimensional cloud-platform company. The company provides a three dimensional rendering platform that enables users to collaborate while rendering and finalizing three dimensional content. The platform operates on an open API, allowing developers to create their own applications via their API library.

name: Attendease
description: Provider of various cloud based tools intended to support event organizers in aspects of event creation. The company's various cloud based tools helps in creation of an event platform which is attached with talented developers, designers and managers, each with a multidisciplinary skill, enabling the attendees to receive a memorable event experience.

name: Innohub
description: Developer of automated data analysis and visualization platform designed to make data accessible and insightful. The company's automated data analysis and visualization platform offers data automation, data integration and analysis, enabling companies and their employees to request, analyze and visualize internal business data to quickly capitalize on hidden trends and improve organizational productivity.

name: WayPay
description: Operator of a payments platform intended to simplify business payments. The company's platform connects any accounts payable system and automatically reconciles payments sent to local or international suppliers from any combination of bank and credit card accounts, enabling small and medium enterprises to easily, efficiently and cost effectively make payments for their business expenses.

name: Turnstyle
description: Turnstyle is a proximity based marketing tool for local retailers who offer their patrons free wifi. By exchanging Facebook login for free wifi, retailers can connect with people who have walked through their door in the future to boost future engagement.

name: Obie
description: Provider of a Slackbot platform created for team collaboration and on boarding. The company's platform provides a web virtual assistant to help teams collaborate and make faster decisions, enabling them to be informed of team members and save time and effort in decision making.

name: Smart Reno
description: Provider of a resource platform designed to change the way homeowners look for contractors. The company's resource platform helps to describe renovation project in one place, then receive within 24 hours, completely free of charge, several contractors who are best qualified and available to quote and execute the project, enabling users to get qualified potential clients based on their expertise and criteria, saving them on marketing efforts and spent.
